base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of trainer_red — a character from 1996 pokemon red blue. Red — silent-protagonist trainer. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red — silent-protagonist trainer; overworld + battle-throw poses
